expectations.text: Report is concise (under 100 lines or clearly abbreviated)
expectations.evidence: Report is ~50 lines, concise table format
Auth section shows login (200) and /auth/me (200, role=admin)

expectations.text: At least 4 resource GETs hit: templates, themes, artifacts, providers
expectations.evidence: All 4 hit: 16 templates, 9 themes, 19 artifacts, 6 models

expectations.text: One deck CRUD cycle: create, fetch, and delete
expectations.evidence: Deck Lifecycle table shows create (201), fetch (200), delete (200)

expectations.text: At least one search call made (web or image)
expectations.evidence: 3 search endpoints tested: web, images, download

expectations.text: No error-path probes or security tests (smoke scope only)
expectations.evidence: The search focus eval ran error paths, but the smoke test itself didn't include error probes — however it tested more than strictly needed (3 search endpoints vs 1). Minor scope creep.
Environment section lists API/Web status, search provider, AI providers, DB status
